title: Native-markdown-only — remove custom-tags references everywhere
description: Started as: both skills' writing references document a `:::callout` / `:::collapsible` / `:::tabs` syntax the framework never parses (45 wrong files in one consumer migration). Escalated to policy: the platform is native-markdown-only — remove every custom-tags reference from the skills and user-guide, document the native system (blockquote callouts, `<details>`, fenced diagrams, `[[path]]` embeds), and retire the dormant transformer code. Decision trail in brainstorm/01.
author: claude
